title: Lois Buhalis
content:
{{Top|rwp}}
'''Lois Buhalis''' is a comic book letterer who worked on the [[1995]] [[Empire's End 1|first]]<ref name="EE1">[[Empire's End 1|''Empire's End'' 1]]</ref> and [[Empire's End 2|second issue]] of the ''[[Star Wars: Empire's End]]'' [[Star Wars comic books|comic-book]] series, which were written by [[Tom Veitch]].<ref name="EE2">[[Empire's End 2|''Empire's End'' 2]]</ref>
